title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
